title: SOHO Design, Configuration, and Secure Administration
description: A home business mixes work, family, guest, camera, printer, smart-device, backup, and remote-access traffic behind an ISP gateway with default credentials and no recovery record. Learners cumulatively produce secure maintainable SOHO network design through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Translate users, devices, applications, coverage, capacity, availability, privacy, accessibility, support, cost, and growth into a bounded topology.
Secure management identity, credentials, MFA where supported, firmware, time, backups, remote administration, logs, recovery, and physical access.
Separate trusted, guest, IoT, work, management, and exposed services with least-required communication and explicit exceptions.
